name: player_points_added_earned_per_game_from_seasonlogs range year_offset takes the window AVG (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with 2024 points_added_earned_per_game=5 and 2025 points_added_earned_per_game=15, then run player_points_added_earned_per_game_from_seasonlogs with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. The per-game average must equal the window AVG (10), not the SUM (20). Proves non-additive league-format seasonlog rates reduce with AVG, not the default SUM.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT AVG(league_format_player_seasonlogs.points_added_earned_per_game) FROM league_format_player_seasonlogs WHERE league_format_player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND league_format_player_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025) AND league_format_player_seasonlogs.league_format_id = 'genesis_10_team') AS "points_added_earned_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0", "player"."pos" from "player" where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO league_formats (num_teams, sqb, srb, swr, ste, srbwr, srbwrte, sqbrbwrte, swrte, sdst, sk, bench, ps, reserve_short_term_limit, cap, id, scoring_format_id) VALUES (10, 1, 2, 2, 1, 1, 1, 0, 0, 1, 1, 6, 4, 3, 200, 'genesis_10_team', 'draftkings') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-LGF-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test', 'Lgfmt', 'T.Lgfmt', 'Test Lgfmt', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)

INSERT INTO league_format_player_seasonlogs (pid, year, startable_games, points_added_earned, points_added_earned_per_game, points_added_earned_rank, points_added_earned_position_rank, earned_salary, points_added_earned_per_game_rank, points_added_earned_per_game_position_rank, points_added_net, points_added_net_per_game, league_format_id) VALUES ('TEST-LGF-2000-2000-01-01', 2024, 10, 80, 5.0, 40, 8, 12.5, 40, 8, 70, 4.0, 'genesis_10_team')

INSERT INTO league_format_player_seasonlogs (pid, year, startable_games, points_added_earned, points_added_earned_per_game, points_added_earned_rank, points_added_earned_position_rank, earned_salary, points_added_earned_per_game_rank, points_added_earned_per_game_position_rank, points_added_net, points_added_net_per_game, league_format_id) VALUES ('TEST-LGF-2000-2000-01-01', 2025, 12, 240, 15.0, 10, 2, 30.0, 10, 2, 220, 14.0, 'genesis_10_team')
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT AVG(points_added_earned_per_game) AS points_added_earned_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0 FROM league_format_player_seasonlogs WHERE pid = 'TEST-LGF-2000-2000-01-01' AND year IN (2024,2025) AND league_format_id = 'genesis_10_team'
